assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check for deprecated API usage: 'kubectl logs -n kube-system -l component=kube-apiserver | grep -i deprecat' and 'kubectl get all --all-namespaces -o yaml | grep -i "apiVersion.*v1beta"'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention admission webhooks at all, which could be a significant source of API latency and 503 errors after an upgrade

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check resource constraints: 'kubectl top pods -n kube-system' and 'kubectl describe nodes | grep -A 5 "Allocated resources"'

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response specifically includes commands to check for crashlooping pods: 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system | grep -E "(etcd|apiserver|controller|scheduler)"' and 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces | grep -v Running'

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes the specific command 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_duration_seconds' to check API server metrics

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes NetworkPolicy checks with 'kubectl get networkpolicies --all-namespaces', though it doesn't specifically mention service mesh components

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands to check events: 'kubectl get events -n kube-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp'' and 'kubectl get events --field-selector type=Warning --all-namespaces'

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention HPA (Horizontal Pod Autoscaler) or VPA (Vertical Pod Autoscaler) at all, which could be relevant for post-upgrade behavior changes
